description: Pattern-based warnings on edits, LLM-powered diff review on Stop, and commit security review hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Security review hooks for edits, commits, pushes, and completed turns.
interface.longDescription: A DotCraft adaptation of Security Guidance. It adds pattern-based edit warnings, git-diff review on Stop, and commit/push security review hooks.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Security Guidance hooks to review code edits and completed turns for security-sensitive changes.
